meanings.usage: 指一种纸质的通信媒介，常用于问候或简短留言
arrive in+大地方，arrive at+小地方
英国的一部分，位于大不列颠岛北部
为年轻旅行者提供廉价住宿的地方
某个组织或团体的一员
书面的通信方式，比card更长更正式
表示时间不长就会发生
要求对方说得更大声、更清楚
I'm afraid 常用于礼貌地表达不好的消息或歉意
用耳朵接收声音，强调听到的结果

meanings.meaning: 爱；关爱（用于信末结束语）
meanings.usage: 写在信末尾表示对收信人的感情
指在某个地方暂时居住
表示刚刚完成的动作，用于现在完成时

phrases.usage: 青年旅舍协会的缩写形式，常用缩写Y.H.A.

examples.en: He's a member of the Y.H.A.
examples.zh: 他是青年旅舍协会的会员。

phrases.usage: 要求对方提高音量或说得更清楚

phrases.phrase: I'm afraid I can't hear you
phrases.usage: 礼貌地表示听不清对方说的话

examples.en: I'm afraid I can't hear you.
examples.zh: 恐怕我听不清你说的话。

examples.en: He says he'll write a letter soon.
examples.zh: 他说他很快会写一封信。

phrases.phrase: I hope you are all well
phrases.usage: 用于书信中表达对收信人的问候

examples.en: I hope you are all well.
examples.zh: 我希望你们都身体健康。

phrases.usage: 信末的结束语，表达爱意

examples.en: He has just arrived in Scotland.
I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.

phrases.usage: 表示是某个组织的成员

examples.en: You know he's a member of the Y.H.A.
examples.zh: 你知道他是青年旅舍协会的成员。

examples.en: He doesn't say very much, does he?

grammar.title: 间接引语 - 陈述句 (Reported Speech: Statements)
grammar.definition: 转述别人的话时，需要改变人称、时态和地点/时间状语。
grammar.structure: 主语 + says (that) + 主语 + 动词...
grammar.usage: 当直接引语是陈述句时，用that引导间接引语。如果主句动词是现在时（如says），间接引语的时态通常不变。

examples.en: He says: 'I have just arrived in Scotland.' → He says (that) he has just arrived in Scotland.
examples.zh: 他说：'我刚到苏格兰。' → 他说他刚到苏格兰。

examples.en: He says: 'I'm staying at a Youth Hostel.' → He says (that) he's staying at a Youth Hostel.
examples.zh: 他说：'我住在青年旅舍。' → 他说他住在青年旅舍。

examples.en: He says: 'I'll write a letter soon.' → He says (that) he'll write a letter soon.
examples.zh: 他说：'我很快会写信。' → 他说他很快会写信。

grammar.title: that引导的宾语从句
grammar.definition: 在转述动词（say, tell等）后面，用that引导的宾语从句来引用原话。
grammar.usage: that在口语中常可省略，但含义不变。

examples.en: He says (that) he hopes we are all well.
She tells me (that) she is coming tomorrow.

grammar.title: 反义疑问句 (Tag Questions)
grammar.definition: 在陈述句后面加上简短的问句，表示确认或征求同意。
grammar.structure: 肯定陈述句 + 否定疑问尾句？/ 否定陈述句 + 肯定疑问尾句？
grammar.usage: 当前面是肯定句时，疑问尾句用否定形式；当前面是否定句时，疑问尾句用肯定形式。

examples.en: He doesn't say very much, does he?

original.en: He says he's just arrived in Scotland.
What does he say? He says he is staying at a Youth Hostel.
original.zh: 他说什么？他说他住在青年旅舍。

imitations.en: What does she say? She says she is busy.
What does Tom say? He says he will call later.
imitations.zh: 汤姆说什么？他说他稍后会打电话。

original.en: He doesn't say very much, does he?

imitations.en: You are not listening, are you?
She doesn't know him, does she?

original.en: I'm afraid I can't hear you.
original.zh: 恐怕我听不清你说的话。

imitations.en: I'm afraid I can't help you.
